active_phases.name: Accounts, Tenancy & Tenant-Scoped Knowledge API
active_phases.objective: Introduce users/tenants/projects with signup/login/session auth and API credentials; scope the knowledge API (write/read/search) per tenant; seed the operator's own tenant and migrate the live knowledge.hi2vi.com corpus in as tenant #1

active_phases.name: Per-Tenant Usage Monitoring
active_phases.objective: Meter per-tenant/per-project usage (API calls, documents saved, search activity) and expose it via API for the dashboard; free plan only — observability, not quotas or billing

active_phases.name: Web App: Tenant Dashboard & Project Detail Pages
active_phases.objective: Authenticated web app with a tenant dashboard and project detail pages consuming the tenancy and usage APIs; all web UI features (knowledge graph included) free

active_phases.name: CLI & Agent-First Onboarding
active_phases.objective: Standalone installable CLI so a user inside Claude Code or Codex can sign up, log in, configure credentials, and use the knowledge features end to end, with agent-readable help/guide docs so the website is never required

active_phases.name: Landing Page & Product Webpage via Claude Design Gate
active_phases.objective: Design and ship the product landing page and public webpage through a hi2vi_web-style Claude Design gate (design canvas + DesignSync + operator sign-off), following the hi2vi_web stack and edge-deploy patterns
